title: Chapter 212
content:
Chapter 211

I slowly opened the door to my room, as quietly as I could. Thankfully, the doors were of good quality, so there was little to no squeaking.

Even if there was any, I doubt the person inside would hear it, given how busy they were.

The only reason I opened it slowly and only so little was that if the person inside was facing the door, then they wouldn’t be able to react immediately.

Luckily, the person inside wasn’t facing the door. Something else was.

A creamy, delicious ass was.

I would recognize those holes even if they were on Japanese ‘recognize your mother’ shows. It was Jack’s mother, my mother, the sweet goddess of beauty and human desire…

The combination was deadly.

“Y-you’re back… Jack…”

She said my name, as if she were dreaming. Maybe she had dreamt about me, more than once, and maybe that was why she wasn’t sure if I was here or not.

“Of course, mother.” I said, making my way to her, sitting next to her on the bed, “Did you miss me?”

Rayla threw herself at me as soon as she was sure I was real and not a figment of her imagination, “Oh, Jack. I missed you so much. We all did.”

Damn, her soft body hugging me and her giant, amazingly soft breasts pressing into my chest was a feeling I couldn’t bypass so easily.

Thankfully, I didn’t have to.

Well, whatever. Couldn’t remember all the trivial details.

Well, one would think that was a ticket to hell on its own, but after this, I would definitely go to hell. Just as long as I could have my fun with this sexy MILF, who was not only my mother, but also had recently been made my wife.

“B-but…” Rayla made an expression like the world had come to an end, but her motherly nature won in the end as she said, “Y-you’re right… You must be exhausted, and I’m not letting you rest. I’m a bad mother.”
